title: April Blossoms
writer: Heinrich Berte, Roger Burford, G.H. Clutsam
actors: Richard Tauber, Jane Baxter, Carl Esmond
plot: The film spotlights famed composer Franz Schubert, who loves a woman from afar. He stands by in quiet desperation as his beloved is married to a dashing military officer, then pours his sorrow (and his love) into his work. To avoi...
